notes: Every SQLite release we've ever patched is recorded here and preserved forever under vendor/patched/<version>/.  Our patches to tool/lemon.c and tool/mkkeywordhash.c add a `-J<path>` flag that writes a machine-readable JSON dump of the parser tables / keyword table.  Nothing else is modified.  The JS runtime consumes the *.prod.json files under generated/<version>/; the *.dev.json files are the un-slimmed originals kept for debugging.  See vendor/README.md for the update workflow and scripts/vendor.ts for the `bun run vendor <ref>` entry point.
